Chromatin_Threads.function_represented: DNA-protein packaging and genomic organization are represented by tangled fibers with nucleosome-like bead texture.
misconceptions_avoided: DNA is not shown leaving the nucleus.
Condensed mitotic chromosomes were not created during this interphase chromatin phase.
Chromatin is not connected through nuclear pore openings.
remaining_accuracy_risks: Accessible cyan regions are a stylized teaching convention, not literal color-coded DNA.
The bead texture is illustrative rather than molecularly scaled.
